home.title: Hilads - Challenges between locals & travelers
home.description: Locals challenge travelers, travelers challenge locals - take one on in any city and meet up to prove it. Plus live events, hangouts and city chat. No sign-up.
home.subhead: 🔥 Become local in any city you visit.
home.intro: Hilads turns any city into a place you can become local in. Take on challenges, join meetups, drop into hangouts, find Local Events - every step earns your place. Real-time, no sign-up.
home.aboutBody: Pick your city. Take on a challenge for locals or travelers, join a meetup, find a hangout, or discover Local Events. The more you build here, the more local you become - and the higher you climb on Most Local.

common.aboutHiladsBody: Hilads is a live social layer over cities worldwide. Open the app, see who's around right now, join an event in one tap, or host your own. No friends list to build first.

event.title: {title} - meet locals and travelers | Hilads
event.titleCity: {title} in {city} - meet locals and travelers | Hilads
event.descPast: {title} in {city}{when}.{attended} On Hilads, locals and travelers connect through challenges - take one on and meet up. See what's on now. No sign-up.
event.descUpcoming: {title} in {city}{time}. On Hilads, locals and travelers connect through challenges - take one on and meet up. Plus what's on nearby. No sign-up.

venue.title: {name} - meet locals and travelers | Hilads
venue.titleCity: {name} in {city} - meet locals and travelers | Hilads
venue.desc: {name}{where} - meet locals and travelers, take on a local challenge, see what's happening nearby on Hilads. Real-time, no sign-up.
venue.aboutBar: {name} is a bar in {city}. Hilads shows you who's heading there today and other places nearby with the same energy.
venue.aboutCafe: {name} is a coffee shop in {city}. Hilads is the easy way to find people to grab a coffee with - locals and travelers, no awkward profile-swiping.

challenge.title: {title} - challenge in {city} | Hilads
challenge.descLocals: {title} - challenge for locals of {city}. Accept the challenge, meet travelers, no sign-up.
challenge.descExplorers: {title} - challenge for travelers in {city}. Accept the challenge, meet locals, no sign-up.
challenge.descGeneric: {title} - accept the challenge on Hilads and meet locals or travelers in {city}.
challenge.aboutBody: On Hilads, locals and travelers connect through challenges. Pick a type - food, place, culture, help - give it a title, and watch people accept. Once completed, the creator validates the challenge.
challenge.descIntlDual: {title} - a cross-city challenge from {origin} to {target}. Take it on, send proof, the creator validates from afar. Hilads.
challenge.descIntlAnywhere: {title} - an international challenge from {origin}. Take it on anywhere in the world, send proof, the creator validates. Hilads.

category.title: {label} in {city}
category.descMany: Challenges between locals and travelers in {city} - take one on and meet up. Plus {total} {label} to explore. Real-time, no sign-up. Hilads.
category.descSomeUpcoming: Challenges between locals and travelers in {city} - accept one, meet up, become local. Plus {count} upcoming {label}. No sign-up. Hilads.
category.descSomeBrowse: Challenges between locals and travelers in {city} - take one on and meet up. Plus {label} to browse. No sign-up. Hilads.
category.descFew: Challenges between locals and travelers in {city} - accept one and meet up. Plus {label} on tonight. Small but real. Hilads.
category.aboutBody: Hilads is the easy way to find people for {label} in {city}. Open the app, see who's heading out, join in one tap.

city.title: Challenges in {city} - locals & travelers | Hilads
city.descHigh: Take on a challenge in {city} - locals challenge travelers and back, then meet up. Plus {count}+ Local Events this week, hangouts and live chat. No sign-up.
city.descMid: Take on a challenge in {city} - locals challenge travelers, travelers challenge locals, then meet up. Plus events tonight, hangouts and live chat. No sign-up.
city.descLow: Take on a challenge in {city} - locals and travelers connect through it, then meet up. Plus hangouts, Local Events and live chat. No sign-up.
city.introEmpty: - be the first to bring the city out.
city.noEvents: No events yet - open the app to create the first one.
city.regionGeneric: Live in {country} or just visiting? Hilads brings the people out.
city.aboutBody1: Hilads is a live social layer over {city}. Open the app, see who's around right now, jump into something happening, or host your own event. No friends list to build first, no sign-up to get in.
city.aboutBody2: Whether you live in {city} or you're visiting for a few days, Hilads makes it easy to meet people the way locals do - through what's actually happening, not through profiles.

past.title: Past activity in {city} | Hilads
past.descItems: A look back at recent hangouts, pulses and validated challenges in {city} on Hilads - see what locals and travelers got up to, then find what's on next.
past.introItems: A look back at recent hangouts, pulses and validated challenges in {city}.
past.whatsNextBody: This is what recently happened in {city} on Hilads. See {link} and join in one tap.
